reviews.review_description: This game is so fun i was playing and i Typed on the computer and i joined so quickly and then i went to city and i had 10 million shiny rocks and i got to play with their staff it was fun and there like active always so overall its a awesome game

reviews.review_title: Fire game get it now it's worth it
